entries.question: Why is my video buffering?
entries.answer: Buffering is usually caused by slow internet. Try: 1) Lower video quality, 2) Restart your router, 3) Close other apps using bandwidth. Need 5+ Mbps for HD, 25+ Mbps for 4K.

entries.question: What video quality options are available?
entries.answer: We offer Auto (adapts to your connection), Low (480p), Medium (720p), High (1080p), and Ultra (4K HDR). Premium subscription required for 4K HDR streaming.

entries.question: Can I watch offline?
entries.answer: Yes! Download movies and shows on mobile devices. Go to Downloads in the app. Downloads expire after 30 days or 48 hours after you start watching. Some content not available for download.

entries.question: How many devices can stream at once?
entries.answer: Simultaneous streams depend on your plan: Basic (1), Standard (2), Premium (4). All plans allow unlimited profiles and device registrations.

entries.question: Is there a live TV option?
entries.answer: Premium subscribers get access to 50+ live channels including news, sports, and entertainment. Live sports require separate add-on. Check the Live tab in your app.

entries.question: What subscription plans are available?
entries.answer: Basic ($9.99/mo): 720p, 1 screen. Standard ($14.99/mo): 1080p, 2 screens. Premium ($19.99/mo): 4K HDR, 4 screens + downloads. All plans are ad-free.

entries.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
entries.answer: Go to Account > Subscription > Cancel. You'll keep access until your billing period ends. No cancellation fees. Reactivate anytime with your viewing history preserved.

entries.question: Can I change my plan?
entries.answer: Yes! Upgrade anytime - new features available immediately. Downgrade takes effect at next billing cycle. No fees to change plans. Go to Account > Subscription to modify.

entries.question: Is there a free trial?
entries.answer: New subscribers get 7 days free. After trial, your chosen plan is charged. Cancel before trial ends to avoid charges. One trial per household.

entries.question: Do you offer annual billing?
entries.answer: Yes! Save 15% with annual billing. Basic annual: $99, Standard: $149, Premium: $199. Switch between monthly/annual anytime in your account settings.

entries.question: How often do you add new content?
entries.answer: New movies and shows added weekly. Originals premiere throughout the month. Content licenses rotate - expiring titles shown in 'Leaving Soon' section.

entries.question: Can I request a show or movie?
entries.answer: Yes! Use the Request Content form in Help section. We review all requests and add popular titles when licensing is available. Can't guarantee all requests.

entries.question: Are subtitles and audio available?
entries.answer: Most content has subtitles in 30+ languages. Many titles have dubbed audio. Check the Audio & Subtitles menu while playing. We're constantly expanding language options.

entries.question: What is StreamPlus Originals?
entries.answer: Originals are exclusive shows and movies produced by StreamPlus. Only available on our platform. Includes award-winning series, films, and documentaries.

entries.question: Why is a title no longer available?
entries.answer: Content licenses expire periodically. When this happens, titles are removed. We try to renew popular content. Check 'Leaving Soon' for advance notice of removals.

entries.question: What devices are supported?
entries.answer: Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Sony, Vizio), Streaming devices (Roku, Fire TV, Apple TV, Chromecast), Gaming consoles (PS, Xbox), Mobile (iOS, Android), Web browsers.

entries.question: How do I update the app?
entries.answer: Apps auto-update by default. Manual update: Smart TVs - check app store, Mobile - App Store/Play Store, Streaming devices - device settings. Always use the latest version.

entries.question: The app keeps crashing. What do I do?
entries.answer: Try: 1) Restart the app, 2) Restart your device, 3) Clear app cache, 4) Uninstall/reinstall, 5) Check for updates. If issues persist, contact support with error details.

entries.question: What internet speed do I need?
entries.answer: Minimum 3 Mbps (SD), 5 Mbps (HD), 25 Mbps (4K). For best experience: 50+ Mbps. Test your speed at fast.com. Slow connection? Try lowering video quality.

entries.question: How do I cast to my TV?
entries.answer: Open StreamPlus on your device, tap the Cast icon, select your TV or streaming device. Ensure both devices are on the same WiFi network. Chromecast, AirPlay, and Miracast supported.

entries.question: How do I create profiles?
entries.answer: Go to Who's Watching > Manage Profiles > Add Profile. Create up to 5 profiles per account. Each profile has its own watchlist, recommendations, and viewing history.

entries.question: How do parental controls work?
entries.answer: Set maturity ratings per profile in Account > Parental Controls. Restrict content by age rating (G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17). PIN protect profile settings. Kids Mode available.

entries.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
entries.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on login screen. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link. Link expires in 24 hours. Check spam folder if not received.

entries.question: How do I change my email address?
entries.answer: Go to Account > Settings > Email. Enter new email and password for verification. You'll need to re-login after changing. Email can only be linked to one account.

entries.question: Is my viewing history private?
entries.answer: Your viewing history is private and used only for recommendations. Other profiles can't see your history. You can delete history in Account > Viewing Activity. We don't sell your data.
